title: Version 2.0.18 Changelog
items: Fix Google OAuth MFA email leak
Request auth and MFA for password change
Auto clean S3 orphaned objects if controller rejects
Fix race condition in file copy id
Add depth limit to recursive folder size
Add CSRF defense-in-depth via custom request header
Reduce JSON body limit from 10MB to 1MB
Validate MFA QR code data:image/URI before rendering
Fix toast ID collision issue
Fix body overflow restore with nested modals
Clean up copy/long-press timeout on ShareLinkModal and FileItem unmount
Fix PasteProgress value to 0-100
Fix event listener leak in MobileImageViewer
Add proper backoff to SSE EventSource reconnection
Enable Chromium sandbox for renderer security
Validate IPC origin against trusted server URL
Fix file watcher resource leak in desktop edit handler
Prevent temp cleanup from racing active edit sessions
Guard webRequest header injection
Cleanup duplicate backend/frontend/electron codes
Improve wiki accuracy/structure/UI-gallery
Unify cloud and OS clipboards into one Copy/Cut/Paste system
Many other minor bug fixes and under the hood improvements
